sample_data.ENT_FIS_AOQ:
UPDATE SF SET SF.BELGE_NO=ISNULL((SELECT P.PROJE_KODU FROM PROJE P WHERE  SF.PROJE_REF=P.PROJE_REF),'') FROM  STOKFISLERI SF 
WHERE  ISNULL((SELECT P.PROJE_KODU FROM PROJE P WHERE  SF.PROJE_REF=P.PROJE_REF),'')<>''
AND SF.FIS_TURU NOT IN (3,6,1)
AND SF.BELGE_NO=''
